title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Compass Group India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Compass Group India
jsonLd.description:
Compass Group India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Chandigarh. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Compass Group India:
Compass Group India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India!
